articles.title: Sharon Lokedi notches 2nd-straight Boston Marathon win
articles.description:

articles.title: Americans sweep handcycling titles at Boston Marathon
articles.description:
PA native Zachary Stinson and New England resident Edie Perkins won the men’s and women’s handcycling titles, respectively. Canada’s May Lim and Julien Pinsonneault won the duo division.

The post Americans sweep handcycling titles at Boston Marathon appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: John Korir wins the 2026 Boston Marathon in a record time
articles.description:
Korir matched his 2025 triumph with yet another dominant display, breaking the previous course record of Geoffrey Mutai from 2011.

articles.description:
